name: Authentication backend session exchange
description: Implement backend auth exchange, refresh, and logout endpoints that verify Firebase identity, map a local user, issue application tokens, and manage refresh-session lifecycle according to docs/product-specs/authentication.md.
evidence: 2026-04-22: refactored worker auth/session structure by splitting API contracts from runtime types, moving JWT/Firebase/hash code into src/lib/auth, and making refresh rotation transactional via D1 batch rollback coverage. Verified with pnpm --filter worker lint, pnpm --filter worker typecheck, pnpm --filter worker test, and full ./init.sh.
